steps.title: Use the recipient contrast
steps.content: The sentence contrasts a prize given to one person with a prize awarded to two or three people. The blank must describe shared receipt of the award.

steps.title: Choose the shared meaning
steps.content: Choice A means after the fact, Choice B concerns ceremony or formality, and Choice D describes an unwilling attitude. The remaining choice means together or shared among multiple recipients, matching the contrast. The answer is C.
